AnnounceCharacterBob: Bob is here! And his teddy bear, Tim, is all sandy! Everyone loves Bob, so you better make it up to him, quick. Work your magic, Phil!
AnnounceCharacterBob_5.0: Bob is here! And his teddy bear, Tim, is all sandy! Everyone loves Bob, so you better make it up to him, quick. Work your magic, Phil!
AnnounceCharacterKevin: Kevin has arrived! He's still upset that you ruined his vacation, but he'll hopefully cheer up when you give him his sweet Welcome Basket!
AnnounceCharacterKevin_5.0: Kevin has arrived! He's still upset that you ruined his vacation, but he'll hopefully cheer up when you give him his sweet Welcome Basket!
AnnounceCharacterStuart: You should cheer up Stuart after his long, cold swim. He'd be great to have at your parties, since he's way more popular than you are right now.
AnnounceCharacterStuart$5.0: You should cheer up Stuart after his long, cold swim. Quick, give him the welcome basket and tell him about the party!
AnnounceCharacterStuart_5.0: You should cheer up Stuart after his long, cold swim. You definitely want him in the mood to party - especially since you're the one planning for him!
AnnounceMinionBeeDo: Phil! It's an angry shark with a laser on its head! Oh, wait. It's Bee-Do. Help him out with one of your Welcome Baskets.
AnnounceMinionCostumeBeedo: Phil! It's an angry shark with a laser on its head! Oh, wait. It's Bee-Do. Help him out with one of your Welcome Baskets.
AnnounceMinionCostumeFrenchMaid: French Maid is here, and he's very upset. That swim in the ocean has ruined his dress! Better hope one of your Welcome Baskets does the trick.
AnnounceMinionFrenchMaid: French Maid is here, and he's very upset. That swim in the ocean has ruined his dress! Better hope one of your Welcome Baskets does the trick.
AnnounceMinions1: Look, Phil! More buddies! That wild party of yours must have got their attention.
AnnounceMinions10: More buddies! They must have heard about your parties! Because there's definitely no other reason they'd want to stop aimlessly floating in the ocean.
AnnounceMinions11: Here come more of your buddies! The more parties, the more Minions!
AnnounceMinions12: More Minions are here! Either they got tired of clinging to cruise ship wreckage, or they heard about your epic parties! Or both.
AnnounceMinions13: Hey, Phil! More of your buddies have arrived! They must have seen one of your awesome parties from the ocean.  Keep throwing more parties to attract more buddies!
AnnounceMinions14: Phil, look! More of your buddies are here! They must've heard about your amazing parties! Either that or a shark tried to eat them.
AnnounceMinions15: Look, Phil! More buddies! That wild party of yours must have got their attention.
AnnounceMinions16: More buddies are here! They can't wait to party with you, Phil! And they REALLY can't wait to put on dry overalls.
AnnounceMinions17: Phil, more of your buddies have arrived! They're sunburned, waterlogged, and heat-stricken. But more importantly, they're ready to party!  Better start working on throwing another one.
AnnounceMinions18: More Minions have arrived! They're so excited to be here on the island. Especially since the alternative is being stranded in the middle of the ocean.
AnnounceMinions19: Here come more of your buddies! The more parties, the more Minions!
AnnounceMinions2: Minions are still arriving on the island! They like what you've done with the place… and are excited for your next party!
AnnounceMinions3: Look, Phil! More buddies! That wild party of yours must have got their attention.
AnnounceMinions4: More of your buddies are showing up! And they all want to be on the guest list for your next Minion bash!
AnnounceMinions5: More buddies are here! They can't wait to party with you, Phil! And they REALLY can't wait to put on dry overalls.
AnnounceMinions6: The Minions just keep on coming... and it's all thanks to your awesome parties! So you better get back to work on planning the next one!
AnnounceMinions7: More Minions are here! Either they got tired of clinging to cruise ship wreckage, or they heard about your epic parties! Or both.
AnnounceMinions8: Look, Phil! It's another batch of buddies! And they want you to celebrate their arrival the only way you now how -- by throwing an epic party!
AnnounceMinions9: Here come more of your buddies! The more parties, the more Minions!
AnnounceMinionSet1: A few of your buddies have just arrived! And that unexpected swim didn't help their mood. Time to cheer them up with your Tiki Lounge!
AnnounceMinionSet2: More Minions have arrived! Word of your awesome parties must have traveled across the ocean! Or else your buddies just heard the super loud music.

ftue_01_arrival: Hey Phil, look! A few more of your buddies have arrived!
ftue_01_commentarySign: "Phil's." It's simple, it's elegant, and most importantly, your buddies will always know where to find you.
ftue_01_end: Look, Phil! I made a place for you to track your success. Every time it goes up, it's like I'm putting one of your drawings on the fridge.
ftue_01_goHaveFun: A beach picnic is a nice first step, but you sank an entire cruise ship, Phil. You're going to need to throw a much bigger party than that to make it up to them.
ftue_01_intro: Your buddies are on their way, and they are NOT happy you ruined their vacation. This uninhabited island is about to be inhabited with angry Minions!
ftue_01_missingSign: You should give your new Tiki Lounge the coolest name you can possibly imagine. Think, Phil, think!
ftue_01_tiki_complete: Good start, Phil! No one can stay mad at you when they're sitting at a tropical Tiki Lounge. That's just science!
ftue_01_tikibar: Here's your chance to redeem yourself, Phil. Turn this island into a Minions Paradise! All you need are snacks, games, gadgets... hmm, this isn't going to be easy! You better get to work!
ftue_03_end: Wow! Most people would describe this as excessive, but I admire your passion, Phil.
ftue_03_start: You should build a place to store these coconuts. Once you have somewhere to store stuff, you have an excuse to get even more stuff!
ftue_05_prep: Stuart's not the only buddy who needs a welcome basket - more are on the way! What's the plan to track everything your buddies need, Phil?
ftue_05_start: Phil, look! You can see Stuart through your binoculars. It'll take him a little while to swim here, so you should prepare for his arrival.
ftue_alligator_narrative_01: If you want to create a Minions paradise, Stuart suggests finding more cool things to do here. Send a buddy out to explore some of the island's undiscovered fun spots.
ftue_alligator_narrative_01$5.0: You still have some party planning to do... but your buddies want to have fun right now! Send one out to explore the island for fun new activities.
ftue_alligator_narrative_01_5.0: Your buddies need some pre-party fun! Send a buddy out to explore some of the island's undiscovered fun spots to put them in a more playful mood.
ftue_alligator_narrative_02: You accidentally discovered alligator skiing! If that doesn't deserve a party, what does? Use the Piñata to earn more Party Points – then throw your next party!
ftue_alligator_narrative_02$5.0: Your buddies are ready to party! All you have to do is earn more Party Points, by using the piñata. The harder you smash, the bigger your bash!
ftue_alligator_narrative_02_5.0: See? Games really get your friends in the party spirit! Now, use the Piñata to earn more Party Points to throw your next party for Stuart!
ftue_coach_make_stuff: Tap to open the Make Stuff menu.
ftue_coach_open_store: Tap to Open the Store Menu.
ftue_coach_other_stuff: Tap to open the Other Stuff menu.
ftue_coach_place_building: Tap, Hold, and then Drag to place object.
ftue_coach_task_phil: Tap to select Phil and click on the Banana Farm to task him.
ftue_fillorder_narrative_01: Great job, Phil! Tap on the Celebration Station to keep track of what you need to prepare for Stuart's Welcome Basket.
ftue_fillorder_narrative_02: Stuart's almost here! Visit the Celebration Station one more time to get one last item before greeting him.
ftue_leisure_narrative_01: While you think up some party ideas, why not let your buddies take out some of their post-shipwreck frustration on a Piñata? It's therapy and candy!
ftue_leisure_narrative_02: Having your buddies use fun stuff around the island – like the Piñata – earns you Party Points!
ftue_leisure_narrative_03: The Party Bar is here! Fill it with Party Points by completing quests, placing decorations, even playing mini-games. When it fills up: it's time to party!
ftue_leisure_narrative_04: Doubloons help you do everything faster. Use these free Doubloons on the Piñata to earn your Party Points even quicker!
ftue_orderboard_narrative_01: Look, Phil! You can see Stuart through your binoculars. It'll take him a bit to swim here. Maybe you can prepare a Welcome Basket for when he arrives.
ftue_orderboard_narrative_01$5.0: That stage is perfect! Stuart and your other buddies will be angry when they arrive, considering you ruined their vacation. Good thing everyone loves a Welcome Basket.
ftue_orderboard_narrative_01_5.0: Good thinking building that Stage!! It's also good thinking to give something to your buddies when they arrive. Like a Welcome Basket
ftue_orderboard_narrative_02: You need a place where you can see which of your buddies is floating closest to the island, and track what you need to make them a personalized Welcome Basket.
ftue_q2_coaching_01: Tap the Minion to select him.
ftue_q2_narrative_01: Your buddies worked up an appetite bashing that Piñata, which means it's the perfect time to ask them to grab some Coconuts! Nutritious, delicious, and currently your only option.
ftue_q2_narrative_02: Now that your buddies are in a better mood, ask them for help so you can focus on creating a better Minions Paradise!
ftue_q2_narrative_03: Now that your buddies are in a better mood, ask them for help so you can focus on creating a better Minions Paradise!
ftue_q2_narrative_04: Have some more free Doubloons to get Coconuts even faster for your hungry buddies. There's no point in hoarding your Doubloons like some eccentric billionaire!
ftue_q2_narrative_05: Starfish are like lobster for Minions. Very valuable... and tasty? To get you started, here's two of them for free.
ftue_q2_narrative_06: Sweet jeepers! At this rate, you'll have a bunch of coconuts in no time. You'll need a place to store them!
ftue_q2_narrative_funflow: A beach picnic is a nice first step, but you sank an entire cruise ship, Phil. You're going to need to throw a much bigger party than that to make it up to them.
ftue_q4_narrative_01: Wonderful! Let's get that coconut into storage.
ftue_q4_narrative_02: Let's use that coconut for your Minion buddies!
ftue_q6_narrative_01: Your island hasn't reached peak awesomeness yet. Fill more orders on the Celebration Station to earn more Sand Dollars, so you can build more cool stuff!
ftue_q6_order:
Greet Stuart with a Welcome Basket by selecting an order on the left! 

It's impossible to stay mad at someone when they give you a welcome basket.
ftue_q8_narrative_01: Normally, Stuart would be happy to see you. Except that you sank the boat right when he was going to perform onstage.
ftue_q8_narrative_02: That's another great idea, Phil. You can build Stuart a stage!
ftue_q8_narrative_03: There's Swamp Gas in Florida, so we're going to need to build a way to harvest the swamp gas.
ftue_q8_narrative_04: Luckily for us, we have a store that sells everything you'll need and probably some stuff you don't, but want anyway.
ftue_q8_narrative_05: Open the Store to find the Swamp Gas Base Resource Building.
ftue_q8_narrative_06: There's Swamp Gas in Florida, so we're going to need to build a way to harvest the swamp gas.
ftue_slotpurchase_01: Use these free Doubloons to add a third Minion buddy to your coconut harvesting party!
ftue_slotpurchase_02: Have you seen what happens when you call three Minions at the same time?
ftue_stage_repair_intro: Look, Phil! You can see Stuart through your binoculars and he doesn't look happy. You should plan a party just for him. You'll need some place to celebrate him as the Guest of Honor!
ftue_start_party_intro: Your Party Bar is full, which means you've earned enough points for an epic Minion Bash!
ftue_storage_narrative_01: Not bad for your first party! But with more Minions on the way, you'll need a place to store supplies for the epic celebrations yet to come.
GOHClickArrowPrompt: Click the arrows to see all your Guests of Honor
GOHStuartFirstTime: As the guest of honor, Stuart motivates your buddies to collect items faster, which means you can build a better paradise for them! Celebrate other buddies to see how they each help motivation differently.

KevinVillainNarrative: Kevin thinks Villain Island is looking good. But one thing is still missing: Villains! Attract them by making Welcome Baskets at the Celebration Station.
key_villain_flux_dialog_farewell: Farewell, Minions, your services were almost adequate.
key_villain_flux_dialog_welcome: Professor Flux just arrived... from the future! Or possibly the past. Either way, it's time to help him relax!
key_villain_frankie_dialog_farewell: As far as vacations go, it could have used more sushi.
key_villain_frankie_dialog_welcome: Frankie Fishlips has arrived, fresh off of another epic heist. Now it's time to help him relax and kick his fins up!
key_villain_spikey_dialog_farewell: Thank you, Minions! I'm leaving this rock for more dastardly deeds elsewhere!
key_villain_spikey_dialog_welcome: Mr. Spikey is here! He may look like a giant blowfish, but he means business. Get to work, Phil!
key_villain_wrestler_dialog_farewell: I would stay to impress you all with my strength, but I see more islands to explore.
key_villain_wrestler_dialog_welcome: Glam Slammer is here, so it's time to help him kick back. And if he asks for a smoothie, don't forget the protein powder!

qc2000000001_step1_description: Stuart was supposed to play a big show for his buddies on the cruise ship before it sank. Phil tries to make him feel better.
qc2000000001_step1_intro: Use these free Doubloons to speed up harvesting by adding a third buddy! Minions tend to do funnier things when they're in threes.
qc2000000001_step1_voice: Get Stuart a coconut while you think of a plan!
qc2000000001_step2_intro: Stuart wants toasted coconut. And toasted coconut he shall have! All you have to do is figure out how to make toasted coconut on a desert island...
qc2000000001_step2_outro: Good job, Phil! Harnessing the power of Swamp Gas is definitely a unique way to go.
qc2000000001_step3_intro: Swamp gas - what a weird, but brilliant, idea! Now just gather the ingredients you'll need for toasted coconut.
qc2000000001_step3_outro: Good job?! (We put in the question mark for added suspense.)
qc2000000001_step3_voice: Collect Swamp Gas from the Swamp Gas Collector.
qc2000000001_step4_intro: Now that we have everything we need, we are on an express train to Toasted Coconut City! Which is a metaphorical city full of toasted coconut!
qc2000000001_step4_outro: You did it! This Toasted Coconut looks delicious. A little charred, but tasty.
qc2000000001_step4_voice: Place the Weapons Depot and then make Toasted Coconut for Stuart.
qc2000000001_step5_intro: Stuart would love for you to find a way to make him pyrotechnics for his shows. Nothing says "I love you, buddy!" like explosives.
qc2000000001_step5_outro: Great work! You can use the Weapon Depot to make explosives and weapons.
qc2000000001_step5_voice: Harvest some resources while you think of ways to use your new Weapons Depot.
qc2000000001_step6_intro: You don't exactly know how to make pyrotechnics, but I bet you can figure it out through trial and error! Hopefully not too much error.
qc2000000001_step7_intro: Mix the coconuts and swamp gas together in the Weapons Depot! That is a sentence nobody has ever said before!
qc2000000001_step7_outro: Congratulations! You made a grenade. It's not pyrotechnics, but still pretty cool!
qc2000000001_step7_voice: Make a Grenade in the Weapon Depot.
qc2000000001_step8_intro: Phil, you made grenades: the Minion version of pyrotechnics. You'd better replenish your supply and make more. These are going to be very popular!
qc2000000001_step8_outro: Hey, you made pyrotechnics! Great job, Phil!
qc2000000001_step8_voice: Try to make Grenades again in the Weapon Depot.
qc2000000005_step1_description: Stuart wants cool pyrotechnics in his shows, and also some toasted coconut. Phil tries to kill two birds with one stone.
qc2000000005_step1_intro: Stuart would love for you to find a way to make him pyrotechnics for his shows. Nothing says "I love you, buddy!" like explosives.
qc2000000005_step1_outro: Great work! You can use the Weapon Depot to make explosives and weapons.
qc2000000005_step2_intro: You don't exactly know how to make pyrotechnics, but I bet you can figure it out through trial and error! Hopefully not too much error.
qc2000000005_step3_intro: Mix the coconuts and swamp gas together in the Weapons Depot! That is a sentence nobody has ever said before!
qc2000000005_step3_outro: Congratulations! You made a grenade. It's not pyrotechnics, but still pretty cool!
qc2000000005_step3_voice: Make a Grenade in the Weapon Depot.
qc2000000005_step4_intro: Phil, you made grenades: the Minion version of pyrotechnics. You'd better replenish your supply and make more. These are going to be very popular!
qc2000000005_step4_outro: Hey, you made pyrotechnics! Great job, Phil!
qc2000000005_step4_voice: Try to make Grenades again in the Weapon Depot.
qc2000000009_step1_description: Phil builds a bathroom for the island.
qc2000000009_step1_intro: Well, every island civilization reaches this point: the point where they need a bathroom. Time to think, Phil. Solutions don't grow on trees.
qc2000000009_step1_outro: A bamboo farm! Great idea. Looks like solutions can grow on trees.
qc2000000009_step2_intro: Time to grab that bamboo! While you're at it, get your other resources too. We'll need a lot of them since we're building a Minions Paradise here, after all.
qc2000000009_step2_outro: Great job on your first bamboo harvest!
qc2000000009_step3_intro: Alright, Phil! You have enough bamboo to build your Minion buddies the bathroom they need. Just in time too! Everyone's been holding it for a while.
qc2000000009_step3_outro: There was nothing here before and now there is! Great work, Phil!
qc2000000009_step4_intro: Yay, you built a bathroom! Now let's relax with some good ole fashioned grenade making.
qc2000000009_step5_intro: Now remember, as the old saying goes, a bathroom is only as good as the air freshener you put in it!
qc2000000009_step5_outro: Alright! You did that all without your mom's help! (Probably.)
qc2000000009_step5_voice: Make an air freshener for the Outhouse.
qc2000000014_step1_description: Phil tries to make the island a more relaxing environment.
qc2000000014_step1_intro: Phil! Your buddies still need your help! Stop chugging maraschino cherries and get back to the Celebration Station.
qc2000000014_step1_outro: Great job! You did something! That automatically gets you more points than watching TV.
qc2000000014_step1_voice: Click on the Minion Board to help your Minion buddies.
qc2000000014_step2_intro: You know what this island needs? A whole lot of things, to be honest. But first, let's come up with some more ways to entertain your buddies!
qc2000000014_step2_outro: Great! This building can be used for making recreational items for your buddies.
qc2000000014_step3_intro: You know what would make this gorgeous natural paradise even better? A relaxing hammock and some tropical lighting! How about it, Phil?
qc2000000014_step3_outro: Beautiful! This place is getting more relaxing every day.
qc2000000014_step3_voice: Place a hammock and Tiki Torch.
qc2000000014_step4_intro: Want more Sand Dollars? Of course you do! Try filling more orders on the Celebration Station. Soon you'll be a Sand Doll-ionaire!
qc2000000014_step4_outro: Hey! You made skateboards. Nice work!
qc2000000014_step4_voice: Collect supplies to make something fun.
qc2000000014_step5_intro: You've got to keep your buddies amused! Let's grab some coconuts and bamboo and make them some awesome stuff to play with.
qc2000000014_step5_voice: Collect more supplies to use in Phil's game experiments.
qc2000000014_step6_intro: The Minions are LOVING these skateboards! We're going to need more coconuts and bamboo to satisfy demand.
qc2000000014_step6_voice: Help invent a new game for your Minion friends!
qc2000000014_step7_intro: Your buddies are wishing for a fishing spot. Ask them to gather some more supplies while you go find one for them!
qc2000000014_step7_voice: Make your Buddies some Butterfly catching gear.
qc2000000014_step8_intro: Skiing on alligators rules, Phil! But as with anything involving alligators, you should probably make a few safety improvements.
qc2000000021_step1_description: Phil brings tools to the Ever Keys.
qc2000000021_step1_intro: Your Minions Paradise is getting a little overgrown. Think you can rig up some landscaping gear? Of course you can - you're Phil!
qc2000000021_step1_voice: Gather together supplies to try and make sharp tools.
qc2000000021_step2_intro: We'll need something sharper to keep these unruly shrubs at bay. Any ideas, Phil? Also, "Unruly Shrubs" would be a good name for a band.
qc2000000021_step2_outro: A Razor Clammery? Innovative thinking, Phil. These are definitely sharp!
qc2000000021_step3_intro: Playing with sharp objects is fun... but earning Sand Dollars is even better! Drop those razor clams and go fill some orders on the Minion Board!
qc2000000021_step3_voice: Help out with two Minion Board orders.
qc2000000021_step4_intro: Ask your buddies to help you harvest Razor Clams, coconuts, and bamboo so you can make some more tools.
qc2000000021_step4_outro: Alright! Now you have another resource to make tools with.
qc2000000021_step5_intro: Now that you have landscaping tools, let's put them to the test. Give this island a haircut!
qc2000000021_step5_outro: You've made some lovely topiaries! Way to vary your skillset, Phil.
qc2000000021_step6_intro: You know what this island is missing? Fancy Scissors. Maybe you can make some with your new razor clams?
qc2000000021_step6_outro: You made Razor Clam Scissors! Amazing!
qc2000000021_step6_voice: Turn the Razor Clams into a more efficient tool.
qc2000000027_step1_description: The Minions miss their gadgets so Phil creates throwing stars and grenades for them.
qc2000000027_step1_intro: Your buddies are having a great time, but they miss all the fun weapons they used to have. It's not a Minions Paradise without weapons, after all!
qc2000000027_step1_outro: Nice work. I definitely almost always believed in you.
qc2000000027_step2_intro: Don't let the shiny new throwing stars distract you from visiting the Celebration Station and helping out your buddies!
qc2000000027_step2_outro: You win at tapping stuff with your finger!
qc2000000027_step3_intro: While your buddies are enjoying their new throwing stars, let's add some more tiki stuff to your Minions Paradise. It's not a paradise without tiki stuff.
qc2000000027_step4_intro: Throwing stars are fun, but easy to lose. Your buddies would appreciate it if you made them some more.
qc2000000027_step4_voice: Get more Clams to make throwing stars.
qc2000000027_step5_intro: You know what would be fun and even more dangerous? If the throwing stars came back to us! Let's work on that, Phil.
qc2000000027_step5_outro: Whoa! You invented the Throwing Star Boomerang! Sure, it came back and hit you in the face, but at least it still looks cool.
qc2000000027_step5_voice: Figure out how to make throwing stars more sustainable.
qc2000000032_step1_description: No one on the island has ice for their drinks. Phil comes to the rescue with a creative solution: a giant ice mountain.
qc2000000032_step1_intro: You've got everything you need for another great Minion party - except cold drinks! You should probably find a way to make some.
qc2000000032_step1_outro: Wow! You made a whole ice mountain without breaking into a song about letting go of your problems.
qc2000000032_step2_intro: Let's spruce up the place a little so the decor is just as cool as those drinks.
qc2000000032_step2_outro: Alright! This Tiki Torch is perfect. A gallon of marshmallows would really hit the spot too, but we can't have it all. Yet.
qc2000000032_step3_intro: Phil! Stop checking to see if your tongue sticks to the ice. Visit the Celebration Station to get more Party Points!
qc2000000032_step3_outro: Alright! You did that all without your mom's help! (Probably.)
qc2000000032_step4_intro: Your Ice is ready to collect! While you're at it, grab more Bamboo and Razor Clams. Who knew partying took so much planning?
qc2000000032_step5_intro: All party planning and no play makes Phil a dull Minion. Why not have your buddies enjoy some Distractivities!
qc2000000032_step5_voice: Gather ingredients for a new drink.
qc2000000032_step6_intro: Now that you have Ice, you can use it to make some frozen goodies for your buddies. Grab some supplies and surprise them with some cool treats!
qc2000000032_step6_outro: Mmm... popsicles! Your Minion friends will love these.
qc2000000032_step6_voice: Make a fancy new iced treat!
qc2000000032_step7_intro: Hey! Looks like you've got enough stuff to make a special batch of popsicles for your pals! Great idea, Phil!
qc2000000038_step1_description: Phil learns to carve ice sculptures for the Ever Keys to decorate and provide air conditioning.
qc2000000038_step1_intro: We should find a better way of getting ice into your buddies' drinks. Karate chopping Ice blocks is both ineffective and really painful.
qc2000000038_step1_outro: Great job! I don't think there's any better way to get ice.
qc2000000038_step1_voice: Find a way to carve ice.
qc2000000038_step2_intro: There's a lot of extra water since this new Ice is melting in the island heat. You should find  a fun place to put it.
qc2000000038_step2_outro: Alright! You did that all without your mom's help! (Probably.)
qc2000000038_step2_voice: Find a way to replenish the island's water supply.
qc2000000038_step3_intro: It's tempting to splash around in all your new fountains and ponds, Phil. But don't forget to visit the Celebration Station to get some more Party Points!
qc2000000038_step4_intro: Some of your Minion buddies suggested Ice Sculptures as a fun decoration. Maybe we can carve them in a more explosive way. We'll need some weapons!
qc2000000038_step4_outro: All these will be great. Who knew destroying ice could be so much fun?
qc2000000038_step4_voice: Investigate other methods to carve ice.
qc2000000038_step5_intro: Alright! We've got our Ice and our Machetes, so let's start carving some Ice Sculptures. That sounds a lot more fun than the alternative - frozen machetes.
qc2000000038_step5_outro: These ice sculptures are great! Nice work.
qc2000000038_step6_intro: Ice sculpting is a fine art... but so is relaxation! Help your buddies relax by sending them off to enjoy some Distractivities.
qc2000000038_step6_outro: Marvelous! You know that's a real compliment since it's three syllables.
qc2000000038_step7_intro: Stuart likes your ice sculpting skills. He'd love to see if you can make the ultimate work of art - a sculpture of him!
qc2000000044_step1_description: Bee-Do is concerned that the Ever Keys doesn't have any emergency supplies.
qc2000000044_step1_intro: Bee-Do wants to run a fire-drill! But before putting out fires, he has to start a few! Help him gather Bamboo and Swamp Gas to start them and also some Ice to put them out.
qc2000000044_step2_intro: Creating that emergency went better than expected. Now we're going to need emergency supplies!
qc2000000044_step3_intro: Phil! Emergency preparedness is very exciting, but you'll have a different kind of emergency if you don't get your Party Points!
qc2000000044_step4_intro: Bee-Do might be able to relax if he had his own special emergency kit. Which he would hopefully share in the event of an emergency.
qc2000000044_step4_outro: Fabulous! You've made our Minions Paradise a safer, yet more explosive place.
qc2000000044_step4_voice: Create Bee-Do an emergency supply kit.
qc2000000048_step1_description: Phil builds a cafe for the resident foodies of the Ever Keys.
qc2000000048_step1_intro: Your parties are going to need some awesome food, Phil. Time to put on your chef's hat!
qc2000000048_step1_outro: Great! You can use this cafe to create different recipes.
qc2000000048_step1_voice: Build a Cafe for your foodie buddies!
qc2000000048_step2_intro: Let's make the area around your new cafe more inviting by adding more decorations. If the alluring smells of food isn't enough, a little ambience should help.
qc2000000048_step2_outro: Great job! You did something! That automatically gets you more points than watching TV.
qc2000000048_step3_intro: Use your new cafe to create a tasty treat for your buddies! Something tasty and nutritious. Or just tasty. Or, honestly, just edible.
qc2000000048_step3_outro: Mmm. Tres bien. That's french for... uhhh. Well, that's french.
qc2000000048_step3_voice: Make some Smoothies for the Scarftorium!
qc2000000048_step4_intro: Your buddies are getting brain freeze from drinking their smoothies so fast! Warm them back up with some Distractivities.
qc2000000048_step4_voice: Collect ingredients for the low-carb menu.
qc2000000048_step5_intro: Your buddies love your Smoothies, Phil! The orders are flying in, so grab some more ingredients!
qc2000000048_step5_outro: You win at tapping stuff with your finger!
qc2000000048_step5_voice: Help fill more Minion Board orders.
qc2000000048_step6_intro: Smoothies are great, but you could always use more Party Points from the Celebration Station!
qc2000000048_step6_outro: This cake looks good enough to jump out of!
qc2000000048_step6_voice: Create a new signature dish for the Scarftorium.
qc2000000048_step7_intro: It's Bee-Do's birthday and your buddies need a special surprise for him. This looks like a job for Chef Phil!
qc2000000054_step1_intro: Mr. Spikey has revealed that he's stealing a safe from a secret underwater bank! He'll need some supplies. Are you up to the challenge, Phil?
qc2000000054_step2_intro: Mr. Spikey's plan is almost complete, he'll just need a few more things. Go, Phil, go! That bank isn't going to rob itself!
qc2000000054_step2_outro: Tres bien. That's French for... uhhh. Well, that's French.
qc2000000054_step2_voice: Gather supplies in preparation for Mr. Spikey's plan.
qc2000000054_step3_intro: First, it's time for reconnaissance. Now that you have everything, it's time to make Headlamps and Grappling Hooks. The fun never stops!
qc2000000054_step3_outro: Yay! You did it the Minion way!
qc2000000054_step3_voice: Mr. Spikey needs a light source and a good distraction.
qc2000000054_step4_intro: Hey, Phil! Secret missions are fun, but it's no secret that checking the Celebration Station is fun too!
qc2000000054_step4_outro: Good job?! (We put in the question mark for added suspense.)
qc2000000054_step5_intro: Your stealth ops revealed that you'll need something to take out the guards and of course, Fireworks for your impending celebration.
qc2000000054_step5_outro: You're too kind. You understand that Villains are people too.
qc2000000054_step5_voice: Help Mr. Spikey by getting more heist supplies.
qc2000000054_step6_intro: Mr. Spikey needs a special lockpick to get into the vault. Maybe you can help him develop one! Nothing says friendship and loyalty like custom lockpicks.
qc2000000054_step6_voice: Create a lockpick to steal from the safe.
qc2000000060_step1_intro: Stuart's rocked so many shows that his ukulele strings are about to snap. You need some string and you need it now.
qc2000000060_step1_outro: A spider web farm is NOT the solution 99.9% of the population would go with, but you've always been special, Phil!
qc2000000060_step2_intro: While you are working on getting his new Ukulele strings, Stuart thinks this is the perfect time for you to add more decorations to the island, so his next performance can be fan-tiki-tastic!
qc2000000060_step2_outro: Stop! Hammock time. (I've always wanted to say that.)
qc2000000060_step2_voice: Place items to give the island a more natural feel.
qc2000000060_step3_intro: Some of your resources are ready to be collected. That includes your new Spider Web! It'll be the first time anyone's ever reached into a spider web intentionally.
qc2000000060_step3_outro: Yay! You did it the Minion way!
qc2000000060_step3_voice: Ask your buddies to help gather Spider-Silk.
qc2000000060_step4_intro: Stuart needs some fun stuff to play with while you're fixing his ukulele strings. You can do this, Phil!
qc2000000060_step4_outro: Great job! Machetes and skateboards to the rescue! We'll have all this spider-silk harvested in no time.
qc2000000060_step4_voice: Find a better way to cut and transport spider-silk.
qc2000000060_step5_intro: Great! Before Stuart rides around on a Skateboard with a Machete, you should get more Party Points at the Celebration Station!
qc2000000060_step5_outro: Good job?! (We put in the question mark for added suspense.)
qc2000000060_step6_intro: Stuart's new Skateboard is great! But two Machetes aren't quite dangerous enough. You should give him some more sharp, pointy objects.
qc2000000060_step6_outro: That wasn't that bad! Those spiders wouldn't hurt a fly. Wait a minute?
qc2000000060_step6_voice: Get your Minion buddies better tools to harvest spider-silk.
qc2000000060_step7_intro: We've got everything we need to re-string Stuart's ukulele! You're a hero, Phil! A ukulele-fixing hero.
qc2000000060_step7_outro: Wow! This spider-silk string guitar is rad! (Do cool people still use the word "rad"? What about the word "cool"?)
qc2000000067_step1_intro: Bee-Do is teaching an island survival course and needs you to help him gather Coconuts and Ice for any survival-related injuries.
qc2000000067_step1_outro: Great! These supplies will do nicely.
qc2000000067_step1_voice: Gather supplies for Bee-Do's wilderness survival class.
qc2000000067_step2_intro: There haven't been many sign ups for Bee-Do's island survival course. Who doesn't want to go to school on vacation? Maybe you can make Bee-Do something delicious to entice them!
qc2000000067_step2_outro: Hooray! Bee-Do can offer students this ice cream to encourage them to sign up for his wilderness survival class.
qc2000000067_step2_voice: Bribe Bee-Do's potential students so they'll take his class.
qc2000000067_step3_intro: Gorging yourself on ice cream is productive, but why not try gorging yourself on Party Points at the Celebration Station?
qc2000000067_step3_outro: Alright! You did that all without your mom's help! (Probably)
qc2000000067_step4_intro: Now that Bee-Do has students enrolled in his class, he's going to need more Ice Cream, and help gathering more emergency supplies.
qc2000000067_step4_outro: Great job! You did something! That automatically gets you more points than watching TV.
qc2000000067_step5_intro: That class was great, but Bee-Do's Megaphone broke! Let's fix it, Phil! It's not Minions Paradise without Bee-Do's soothing screams.
qc2000000067_step5_outro: This new Megaphone and speaker set will be perfect for Bee-Do and his ever-growing loudness!
qc2000000067_step5_voice: Help Bee-Do by fixing his megaphone.
qc2000000072_step1_intro: There's only one problem with throwing parties for Minions - cleaning up after them! Lucky for you, French Maid wants to help. All you need are the proper tools.

qc2000000163_step2_intro: Great! Now all Flux's time machine needs is a little fuel. He'll be bragging to his former classmates in no time!
qc2000000163_step2_voice: Invite your Minion buddies to investigate these hedges!
qc2000000163_step3_intro: Your weapons business is booming! But speaking of booming, the Villains are requesting a new kind of bomb to add to their collections.
qc2000000163_step3_outro: A Banana bomb! Nice! Fun and high in potassium.
qc2000000163_step3_voice: Have your Minions play on the waterslide!
qc2000000163_step4_intro: Bob's discovered a hot air balloon! Now your buddies can finally reach those mangoes they've been eyeing.
qc2000000163_step4_voice: Go play in that hot air balloon!
qc2000000166_step1_intro: Bob wants you to tap the fountain in your town square to build it - just in case he wants to give his teddy bear, Tim, a bath.
qc2000000166_step1_outro: Yay! You did it the Minion way!
qc2000000167_step1_intro: If Stuart's level of irked is any indication, you'll need something fun and relaxing for all your buddies to do! Ask a buddy to scout out the island!
qc2000000167_step2_intro: Phil, use these free Doubloons to have a third Minion buddy help grab those coconuts.
qc2000000167_step3_intro: Stuart wants toasted coconut. And toasted coconut he shall have! All you have to do is figure out how to make toasted coconut on a desert island...
qc2000000167_step4_intro: Swamp gas - what a weird, but brilliant, idea! Now just gather the ingredients you'll need for toasted coconut.
qc2000000167_step5_intro: Now that we have everything we need, we are on an express train to Toasted Coconut City! Which is a metaphorical city full of toasted coconut!
qc2000000167_step6_intro: Stuart would love for you to find a way to make him pyrotechnics for his shows. Nothing says "I love you, buddy!" like explosives.
qc2000000167_step7_intro: You don't exactly know how to make pyrotechnics, but I bet you can figure it out through trial and error! Hopefully not too much error.
qc2000000167_step8_intro: Mix the coconuts and swamp gas together in the Weapons Depot! That is a sentence nobody has ever said before!
qc2000000167_step9_intro: Phil, you made grenades: the Minion version of pyrotechnics. You'd better replenish your supply and make more. These are going to be very popular!
qc2000000168_step1_intro: A rare type of combustible chili grows on this island. Maybe your buddies can help harness its power!
qc2000000168_step2_intro: Fireballs don't grow on trees, but luckily chilis do! Pick some peppers and some coconuts to create some flaming balls of fire for your buddies!
qc2000000170_step1_intro: Make Grenades & Bamboo for Coconut Bazooka.
qc2000000170_step2_intro: Make Coconut Bazooka to attract the big boss.
qc2000000172_step1_intro: Make Bamboo & Razor Clams for Machete.
qc2000000172_step2_intro: Make Machete to attract the big boss.
qc2000000174_step1_intro: Now that there are more Minions on the island, it's time to have a party! You need party items. Phil, can you think of any ideas?
qc2000000174_step2_intro: A piñata! Have a Minion try it out to help get the party started.
qc2000000174_step3_intro: The party is almost ready. Finish the final preparations and then throw a party the Minions won't ever forget! At least, until the next one.
qc2000001010_step1_intro: Stuart suggests you make more fun stuff for your buddies! But you're gonna need more than just Swamp Gas and Coconuts. Think, Phil, solutions don't grow on trees!
qc2000001010_step2_intro: Woo-hoo! Bamboo! Your buddies can't wait to help you collect it and see what you are going to build them next. You should probably Grab some Coconuts too.
qc2000001010_step3_intro: Check the Celebration Station you built earlier to make some Party Supplies and earn additional Party Points. The more you earn, the more parties you can throw!
qc2000001010_step4_intro: You know what this island needs? A lot of things, to be honest. But first, you should build a place where you can make fun recreational items for your buddies!
qc2000001010_step5_intro: Collect more Bamboo and Coconuts, so you can test out your new Rec Center. Your buddies are excited to see what you're going to make for them next.
qc2000001010_step6_intro: Nice job with the Skateboards, Phil! You should throw a Skateboard party! Check out the Celebration Station to make some party supplies and earn those Party Points!
qc2000001020_step1_intro: Stuart thinks your paradise could use a relaxing Hammock. Come on, Phil! Nothing says you care like a bunch of string between two trees.
qc2000001020_step2_intro: Stuart thinks it's time to throw another party. How about treating yourself to a little Fishing Frenzy and earn some more Party Points? It's alligator skiing time!
qc2000001020_step3_intro: Stuart feels your parties are still missing something... more Stuart! He's generously offered to perform at your parties if you build him a Stage.
qc2000001040_step1_intro: Minions only need three things: air to breathe, water to drink, and Grenades to detonate. Your island has plenty of air and water, so how about making more Grenades?
qc2000001040_step2_intro: You have all the Grenades you could ever want... for now. But you can always use more Party Points! Head back to the Celebration Station to rack up more.
qc2000001060_step1_intro: You need some sharp objects on this island! It's hard to get up to the level of mischief Minions are accustomed to with explosives alone.
qc2000001060_step2_intro: You know what else would look "sharp" on this island... a giant Minions Sign! Anything worth doing is worth overdoing.
qc2000001060_step3_intro: Playing with sharp objects is incredibly dangerous... and for Minions, incredibly fun! Grab some Razor Clams to make some throwing stars. Collect some Coconuts and Bamboo as you'll need some targets.
qc2000001060_step4_intro: Making a Throwing Star can be pretty tricky. Take one Razor Clam, add a Razor Clam, add another Razor Clam, and... okay, it's not that tricky.
qc2000001060_step5_intro: Flinging around super-sharp Throwing Stars may be fun... but it doesn't earn you Party Points. For that, you better head back to the Celebration Station!
qc2000001060_step6_intro: Phil, your Throwing Stars have turned every Minion on this island into an amateur ninja. And they love it! Looks like you're gonna need more Razor Clams.
qc2000001070_step1_intro: Now that more Minions are joining the party, you'll need more ways to make sure everyone is having a blast!
qc2000001070_step2_intro: Swamp Gas? This island is just full of surprises. Some of them smell better than others. Collect some of that Swamp Gas and see what it can do.
qc2000001070_step3_intro: Focus, Phil! Playing in Swamp Gas is fun, but you've got to find a way to put more POW in your parties.
qc2000001070_step4_intro: A Weapons Armory! That'll make sure your buddies have an explosive time on this island. Better collect some more Swamp Gas first.
qc2000001070_step5_intro: See what your new Weapons Armory can do! Grab some more Swamp Gas and Coconuts to give it a try. What's the worst that could happen?
qc2000001070_step6_intro: What do you get when you combine Coconuts and Swamp Gas in the Weapons Armory? Hopefully something better than a stinky bra.
qc2000001070_step7_intro: Whoa! You made Grenades! Way to take "having a blast" literally, Phil. These are going to be incredibly popular. Better get supplies to make more!
qc2000001077_step1_intro: Paper is a part of any sophisticated society. If you want this paradise to be more sophisticated, you can start wearing a monocle... Or figure out a way to start collecting paper.
qc2000001077_step2_intro: Your paradise is so sophisticated now! You could use it to make books! Or a fine piece of art! What do you think, Phil?
qc2000001080_step1_intro: Paper is a part of any sophisticated society. If you want this paradise to be more sophisticated, you can start wearing a monocle... Or figure out a way to start collecting paper.
qc2000001080_step2_intro: Your paradise is so sophisticated now! You could use it to make books! Or a fine piece of art! What do you think, Phil?
qc2000001083_step1_intro: Your buddies are having a blast on the beach... but what about up in the sky? Take the fun to new heights with a spectacular air show!
qc2000001083_step2_intro: Get your friends into the airshow spirit by making your friends some paper airplanes! Get folding, Phil!
qc2000001083_step3_intro: You gained valuable aeronautical experience making paper airplanes. Time to take this air show up a notch - by making some kites and hang gliders!
qc2000001083_step4_intro: Your air show has everything a Minion could ever want... except extreme physical danger! But you can change that. All you need are jet packs!
qc2000001090_step1_intro: The Holiday Minion is here! He's super excited to spend the winter season with you. Your paradise may be hot and sunny, but he'll show you how to make it fun and festive! Nothing says holiday cheer like a snowman, so Holiday Minion wants you to build one! Since there isn't any snow, you'll have to be creative.
qc2000001090_step2_intro: Great job, Phil! The best part is that it will never melt. Holiday Minion has lots more ideas for festive decorations, but first you'll need some Bamboo.
qc2000001090_step3_intro: Holiday Minion wants to make sure your buddies keep cool this holiday on their very own epic snowboard ramp! Help him build it.
qc2000001090_step4_intro: Some people celebrate the holidays by eating a ham. But why eat a ham... when you can feed it to a hungry gator? Go enjoy a round of Fishing Frenzy!
qc2000001090_step5_intro: Your snowboard ramp isn't just spreading cheer. It's also earning you Party Points! Go collect them - along with more Bamboo for your next decoration.
qc2000001090_step6_intro: Putting up holiday decorations isn't the only way to spread cheer. You can also throw parties! Prepare for the next one at the Celebration Station.
qc2000001096_step1_intro: Your buddies want a holiday tree! You can swim thousands of miles to a cold-weather climate where evergreens grow... or just use a Palm Tree.
qc2000001096_step2_intro: Now that they have a tree, your buddies can't wait to open their presents. Speed up the unwrapping process with some Razor Clams and Throwing Stars!
qc2000001096_step3_intro: You may not be able to make a snowman out of actual snow... but you can make a Minion out of Ice! Collect some, then carve it into an Ice Sculpture.
qc2000001096_step4_intro: The best thing about holidays in the tropics is that it's still warm enough to go fishing... or alligator waterskiing! Go enjoy some Fishing Frenzy!
qc2000001096_step5_intro: Spread more cheer by decorating the island with some colorful candy canes. You can turn your holiday wonderland into a holiday candy land!
qc2000001096_step6_intro: Head over to the Celebration Station to complete any outstanding party supplies. Then head over to the snowboard ramp to see some outstanding tricks!
qc2000001102_step1_intro: Holiday Minion needs help with some DIY decorations. Since no one needs socks at the beach, he wants to hang them... with care!
qc2000001102_step2_intro: It's not the holidays without over-eating! Help Holiday Minion make some sweet treats for the Minions to gorge on.
qc2000001102_step3_intro: Your Minion buddies want to make Snow Angels! There's no snow, but Holiday Minion has a trick up his holiday sweater sleeve...
qc2000001102_step4_intro: 'Tis the season of giving, and your Minion buddies could use some new fishing gear! Collect Spider Webs to make them the gift that keeps on fishing!
qc2000001102_step5_intro: Finding the perfect holiday gift can be tough... but there's plenty of junk in the sea! All you need is a good Fishing Rod to snag it.
qc2000001102_step6_intro: It's the holiday season, but also a day at the beach! Make some Fishing Nets for your buddies to net some fun at the beach, and get Party Points by making Sand Angels.
qc2000001108_step1_intro: The Minions sculpted a lovely, sand holiday tree! The best part about a sand tree is that the presents under it are like buried treasure!
qc2000001108_step2_intro: Time for a Minion holiday tradition - Fireballs and Frozen Bananas! Okay, so it's not a tradition yet, but all traditions start somewhere.
qc2000001108_step3_intro: Add some floral flair to your paradise with some wild Poinsettias! It's hard to believe that one of them floated here from their native Mexico, so let's not focus on that.
qc2000001108_step4_intro: Help the Minions literally burn off some of those extra holiday calories by making them Flaming Skateboards!
qc2000001108_step5_intro: Holiday Minion's snowboard ramp got a tad melty thanks to those Flaming Skateboards. A Freeze Ray should do the trick to cool it down!
qc2000001108_step6_intro: The weather outside is far from frightful, but it could still be a little cooler. Holiday Minion suggests you make a couple things to cool off with!
qc2000001114_step1_intro: Snow is in short supply in the tropics, but that doesn't mean Snowcones have to be!
qc2000001114_step2_intro: What do you get a Minion who has everything? A Bob Sled and a Pepper Spray Bazooka, of course!
qc2000001114_step3_intro: The best part about decorating your own private paradise is that no one can tell you when to take your holiday decorations down. Remote island means no pesky neighbors!
qc2000001114_step4_intro: Help Holiday Minion gather Fireflies and Fireworks to use as holiday lights. Holiday Minion is energetic as well as energy conscious!
qc2000001114_step5_intro: Many holiday celebrations are light-themed - and Holiday Minion wants yours to shine brightly! Help him out by making Torches and Headlamps.
qc2000001114_step6_intro: It's better to give than to receive... especially when the gift is fruitcake! Give it to somebody far, far away by constructing a Fruitcake Launcher!
qc2000001120_step1_intro: Bob is craving sugary snacks. Place a Honey Hive so you can harvest honey and make Bob's favorite treats.
qc2000001120_step2_intro: Bob worked up an appetite harvesting honey! Make him some honeycomb to snack on. Then, make him some chewing gum, because no one likes honeycomb breath.
qc2000001122_step1_intro: Ever since you planted those chili peppers, your buddies have been craving something spicy. What are you waiting for? Grab some chilis and start cooking!
qc2000001122_step2_intro: Great job on that curry, Phil... is what your buddies would be saying if their mouths weren't on fire! Quick! Cool their tastebuds off with some ice cream!
qc2000001122_step3_intro: Uh-oh, Phil. That ice cream has given your buddies brain freeze! Try making something that isn't too hot or too cold... like sushi!
qc2000001122_step4_intro: Your buddies loved that sushi, Phil. But now they're ready for dessert! How about some frozen bananas?
qc2000001122_step5_intro: The good news: your buddies aren't hungry anymore. The bad news: they ate too many frozen bananas! Make them feel better with a spicy detox drink.
qc2000001127_step1_intro: There's nothing Minions love more than catching a wave - unless it's a heat wave! Quick, harvest some ice for your buddies before they overheat.
qc2000001127_step2_intro: Great job on that ice! There's just one problem: by the time you deliver it to your buddies, it'll be melted! You're gonna need a high tech solution.
qc2000001127_step3_intro: You need two things to invent a high tech device: a great idea, and batteries. Since you don't have any ideas yet, maybe start with the batteries.
qc2000001127_step4_intro: Now that you have batteries, you'll need that delivery idea. They say the best inventors have their heads in the clouds, so why don't you build yourself a hang glider to help shake an idea loose?
qc2000001127_step5_intro: Phil, you're a genius! Adding batteries to a hang glider turns it into a drone... which can deliver ice to all your buddies! Not to mention banana splits!
qc333214_pre: You're going to need more coconuts.  Your buddies were having so much fun harvesting them, so keep them happy and distracted getting coconuts until you build them more cool stuff!

QuestDescFTUELeisurea: This is the introduction to the leisure part of the ftue
questDialogKey1: Welcome to Henchman Week on Villain Network Channel, the only channel by Villains, for Villains. I'm Rat Finkel. Today's episode is all about everyone's favorite little yellow screw-ups, the MINIONS.
questDialogKey10: Wow! Look at those Minions! Fun fact: the official term for a group of Minions is "group."
questDialogKey11: Your Minions look weary after all that tapping. They could use some relaxation...
questDialogKey12: Whoever invented Inner Tubes is a genius. Or they just really wanted a giant donut. Now I want a giant donut.
questDialogKey13: The Minions reeeaally want to use the inner tube. But like everything, they won't do it until you tell them to. Take pity on them! Tap a Minion, then tap the Inner Tube.
questDialogKey14: Ahh. Now the Minions are ready for anything. Especially more inner tubing! No? It was worth a shot.
questDialogKey15: That's more stuff than back when they had no stuff, so they should probably have a storage building. Building the Storage Building! You can find it in the Other Stuff tab in the shop.
questDialogKey16: You can see any stuff you get by tapping this building. Way better than the original plan of jettisoning everything into space.
questDialogKey17: There is a new "it" Villain in town... Professor Flux! He's been seeking a new power source for his time machine ever since the electric company cut him off for not paying his bills (turns out it's hard to get work when you're a self-proclaimed Mad Scientist). Let's help him out by building him a Battery Center from the Make Stuff tab in the shop.
questDialogKey18: Word on the street is that Professor Flux will be pleased. The other word on the street is that there are also no streets in this game, so we're not entirely sure where that information came from.
questDialogKey19: Just the giant face I was hoping to see. My name is Professor Flux. I promise you that I won't pop up out of nowhere like this in the final game. On the other hand, I am an evil mad scientist so I can do whatever I want! Now, get those Minions to make me a battery! Tap a Minion, then tap the Battery Center. Tap to collect the Battery when it is ready!
questDialogKey2: As we all know, the Minions have existed since the dawn of TIME - starting out as itty-bitty yellow, single-celled organisms and evolving through the ages to serve big bad criminals. But what did their lives look like before they met their current BFF, Gru?
questDialogKey20: You're like a million times cooler than your friend who knits stuff. And exactly as cool as your friend who makes batteries.
questDialogKey21: In case you haven't deduced it yet, I'm building the world's most powerful Potassium Ion Battery! I know what you're thinking: I'm in awe of myself too. All I need is a rich source of potassium: Bananas! Build me a Banana Farm from the Make Stuff tab in the shop!
questDialogKey22: Ah yes. My plan is coming to...FRUITION! Get it? Because a banana is a fruit, and I said FRUITion. No? Oh come on, that was great.
questDialogKey23: Or, let me rephrase that. You and the Minions can harvest 2 bananas while I hang out off-screen and play Bejeweled. Tap 2 Minions and then tap the Banana Farm. Tap the Bananas to collect them when they are ready!
questDialogKey24: I made it past level 112 in Bejeweled! Good job to you too for that thing you just did.
questDialogKey25: Now all we need to do is combine our items to create a potassium ion battery. Minions, you wait here while I fetch my electrolytic combinator from the lab.
questDialogKey26: The Minions have decided to help Professor Flux out while he is away by taking matters into their own hands. Who needs an electro-whatever combinamajig to mix a battery and a banana together? Just use a blender! Build a smoothie shop from the Mix Stuff tab in the shop.
questDialogKey27: Let's start blending these bananas and batteries together before Professor Flux gets back and ruins the surprise.  He deserves something nice, with how hard he works and how bald he is. Blend the ingredients in the Smoothie Shop! Tap the Smoothie Shop, then drag the recipe into production.
questDialogKey28: Great job blending the Batteries and Bananas. Whoa, you made an Energy Shake! And it has such a healthy, mercury-riddled glow.
questDialogKey29: Drag the Time Machine out of the Other Stuff tab in the Shop and place it on the grass. Looks like Flux built it out of an old cardio machine. How ecologically friendly. Or maybe he just robbed a spin class.
questDialogKey3: Today we'll cover a little known time in the Minions' history: the lost years! We'll tell you how they started a Villain paradise where they helped some of the world's baddest characters do their dastardly deeds. It all started when they got their hands on some cheap swampland in Florida...
questDialogKey30: Thanks for helping the Minions move that. Must have been hard work for your finger.
questDialogKey31: Don't you dare touch my time machine! That means YOU!
questDialogKey32: The Minions think they can power that thing themselves if they drink the Energy Shake! Have a Minion jump on the bike and ride! Tap a Minion, then tap on the Time Machine.
questDialogKey33: Looks like Flux isn't coming back anytime soon, but on the upside, at least you get to keep all the cool stuff you built.
questDialogKey34: Building a Want Ads Board from the Other Stuff tab will let us start selling items to Villains around the world. The Villains will pay us money. We can use the money to buy stuff like-- actually, you know how money works. We'll stop talking.
questDialogKey35: This Want Ads Board lets Villains from anywhere post what they need. Just don't judge them and their dastardly ways. This is a safe zone for evildoers. Tap on the Want Ads Board and fulfill an order now!
questDialogKey36: It's profitable, and it helps Villains, so it's for a good cause! Kind of.
questDialogKey37: You've completed the tutorial. The Minions ate all of our gold stars, but we hope you still feel rewarded. Keep exploring the world of the Minions!
questDialogKey38: This is a automatic quest test. Ignore this if it doesn't concern you.
questDialogKey39: To trigger the quest chain: Place a banana farm
questDialogKey4: These are Minions and if there's one thing in the world they hate, it's being poked. Whatever you do, do not poke them with your finger.
questDialogKey5: Okay, so maybe they actually like being poked. We were playing hard to get. Poke him again! Then tap a couple of empty spots on the ground to tell him where to go.
questDialogKey6: These little guys are just full of surprises. And bananas.
questDialogKey7: Now let's make this into a real party. Tap two Minions! (It's a small party.)
questDialogKey8: Now try three Minions! We know. Counting is hard
questDialogKey9: Now tap and hold anywhere on the board, and keep holding until you have selected all of your Minions! Minions are happier in groups, like fish or people who play the bongos.
QuestRepairStageDesc: Now, that wasn't so hard, was it?

TSMVillianTeaserLevel6Description: Villain Lair unlocks at Level 10, so here's some free Doubloons to help get you there!
TSMVillianTeaserLevel9Description: 1 more level until Villain Lair unlocks. Here's some stuff to help you repair the lair!
UnlockCharacterBeedo: Phil! It's a grumpy shark with a laser on its head! Oh wait?it's Bee-Do. Help him out!
UnlockCharacterBob: That was a long swim, Bob. Let's hope the welcome basket Phil has prepared takes your mind off how he ruined your vacation.
UnlockCharacterFrenchMaid: French Maid is here, and he's tres angry from having to swim so long. Good thing you have plenty more welcome baskets!
UnlockCharacterKevin: That was a long swim, Kevin. Let's hope the welcome basket Phil has prepared takes your mind off how he ruined your vacation.
UnlockCharacterStuart: Normally, Stuart would be happy to see you. Except that you sank the boat right when he was going to perform onstage. Oops.
UnlockForMPLeaveBehind:
Unlock by reaching level {0} and
completing the Master Plan
UnlockKevinForVillainIsland: Kevin's the key to reaching this Villain Paradise!
UnlockMinions1: Hey, Phil! More of your buddies have arrived! That answers the age old question: can Minions swim?
UnlockMinions10: Buddies! Buddies buddies buddies buddies buddies! BUDDIES! (Phil got to type this one.)
UnlockMinions11: Hey, Phil! More of your buddies are here!
UnlockMinions12: What a great day! The sun is shining, the water is warm, and look, more buddies! Wait. Why is the water so warm?
UnlockMinions13: More buddies! Hey, things are going great! They should ask you to run all the islands.
UnlockMinions14: Look! Buddies! Oooo, think of all the fun you'll have! But don't think too hard or you might break something.
UnlockMinions15: More buddies are joining your island! Hooray! If you had an enthusiasm detector it'd be going off now. Beep beep beep. YAY YAY YAY!
UnlockMinions16: More Minions are here to come play in paradise! It's the it thing to do according to "Villain Vacation Magazine."
UnlockMinions17: Woo! More buddies! That's more than less buddies which is more reason to celebrate.
UnlockMinions18: Hey, a few more of the tribe is here! Keep up the good work, Phil!
UnlockMinions19: Phil! Look! More buddies! Let's get this party started! Er, keep this party going!
UnlockMinions2: More buddies are here! You must be doing something right, Phil. Maybe it's those new shorts...but it's probably this new island.
UnlockMinions3: Phil! Look over there! More of your buddies are joining you!
UnlockMinions4: More of your buddies are here! They must have followed the sweet smell of your success. That is what that smell is, right?
UnlockMinions5: Phil, look! The ocean has learned how to walk! Oh wait, it's just more of your buddies coming out of the water. But that's even more exciting!
UnlockMinions6: Yay! More buddies are here! Maybe they brought sand! We need more sand. Oh wait. We need sandWICHES? Well it's still great to see them!
UnlockMinions7: Yippee! More buddies to share the fun with! Yes, this means you even have to share the bananas.
UnlockMinions8: Guess what? You've got more Minion buddies to play with! Whatever you guessed was a good guess, though.
UnlockMinions9: Hooray! More of your buddies have joined the party. Finally that phrase isn't just a figure of speech!
UnlockNextMinions: Look, the latest Minions have arrived on shore! Hmm, they don't look too happy with you, Phil. Perhaps you should offer them something to drink at the bar?
UnlockPrestigeMinions: That was a long swim, Stuart. Let's hope the welcome basket Phil has prepared takes your mind off how he ruined your vacation.
upgradeMinionsQuestDialog: Now that you have a Minion Level-Up Building, use these Minion Level-Up Tokens to upgrade your Minions.
UsageSharingDisableDesc:
In addition to information that you give EA directly, EA collects certain information for purposes of improving our products and services, providing services to you, facilitating the provision of software updates, dynamically served content and product support, communicating with you as well as enhancing your experience when using EA products and services.  This data will not be shared with any third party in a way that can identify you. When you disable usage data sharing, in addition to anonymous data, EA will continue collecting data reasonably necessary to operate the products and services.

CHANGES WILL BE REFLECTED IN YOUR NEXT GAME PLAY SESSION.

VillainResources: Orders are ready to be filled!
VillainSlotFull: Villain island is bustling! Finish a quest to free up a cabana!
WaterslideMignetteDesc: Enjoy the ride and then tap the sphere to pull off a great dive!
WaterSlideNotification: Water Slide Dive is ready to play: Time to practice your diving skills!
WelcomeHutIntro: Your paradise is almost perfect! Great parties, great beaches, great villain island. What? You don't have a villain island yet?! You need cabanas and a place to greet villains, stat!
